backstory.original: Fen is a Drow Dhampir Warlock with a touch of mischief and sneakiness. She's loyal to those she cares for, a fearsome opponent for those who have earned her hate. Above all else, everything she's done has been for Isolde's freedom. Now she needs a new purpose to fight for, and maybe she can find it among the Society.
backstory.display: 芬是个半吸血鬼卓尔精灵邪术师，性格略带狡黠和鬼祟。她对朋友如春天般温暖，对敌人像严冬一样残酷无情。最重要的是，她所做的一切都是为了伊索德的自由。现如今，她需要一个新的目标来为之奋斗。或许，她可以在协会中找到它。

description.original: Fen darts out to the closest enemy and slashes with her longsword, hitting all nearby enemies.
description.display: 芬飞身冲向最近的敌人，并用长剑发动顺劈，击中附近的所有敌人。

description.original: Fen sprouts wings and charges, dealing damage to all enemies and knocking them back.
description.display: 芬张开翅膀发起冲锋，对所有敌人造成伤害并将其击退。

longDescription.original: Fen transforms into her dread form. She sprouts wings, leaps into the air, and charges directly across the area, dealing one hit of ultimate damage to all enemies she passes and knocking them back a short distance.
longDescription.display: 芬转变为恐惧形态。她生出翅膀跃入半空，直接冲向整片区域，对所有经过的敌人造成杀招伤害，并将其击退一小段距离。

description.original: Fen increases the damage of all Champions in her Column
description.display: 芬使同列所有勇士的伤害提高

description.original: Fen increases the progress rewarded for Patron Challenges provided from parties that she is in.
description.display: 芬提高她所在探险队提供的赞助者挑战奖励的进度。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the damage of all Champions in her column by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)使她纵队中所有勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Fen increases the damage of Champions in her column.
tipText.display: 芬提高同列勇士的伤害。

description.desc: When $(source_hero) is in the formation in any party, patron challenge progress made by all parties is increased by $(amount)%.
当$(source_hero)处于任意探险队的阵型中时，所有探险队的赞助者挑战进度增加 $(amount)%。

tipText.original: Fen increases the amount of progress credited in Patron Challenges in the party she is in.
tipText.display: 芬提高她所在探险队在赞助者挑战中的进度。

description.desc: $(source_hero) reduces the normal attack speed of all Warlocks in the formation by $(seconds_plural amount) for each point of Wisdom an adjacent Champion has above $(subtract_from_stat___2).
相邻勇士的感知每比 $(subtract_from_stat___2) 高 1 点，$(source_hero)均使阵型内所有邪术师的普通攻击速度降低$(seconds_plural amount)。

$(source_hero) imbues her blade with eldritch energy, increasing the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(amount)% and causing her normal attack to deal an additional 5 seconds of BUD based damage with each hit.
$(source_hero)为自己的剑注入魔能，使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(amount)%，并使她的普通攻击每次命中时额外造成 5 秒基础杀招伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Fen focuses on her eldritch blade, increasing her support and dealing additional damage.
specializationDescription.display: 芬专注于她的魔能剑，提高她的支援能力并造成额外伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) embraces her Dhampir heritage and increases her damage by $(amount)%.
$(source_hero)发挥她的半吸血鬼血统，使自身伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Fen focuses on her Dhampir heritage, dealing much more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 芬专注于她的半吸血鬼血统，造成更多伤害。

description.desc: $(source_hero) increases the effect of Mischievous, but Dangerous by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation that is either a Black Dice Society affiliation member or has a WIS of 15+, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中的每位黑骰子协会从属组织成员，或感知为 15+ 的勇士，均使$(source_hero)的“顽皮但危险”效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

description.display: 我们是亲人，放心交给我吧。

description.original: I do what I must to protect those I care about.
description.display: 我会竭尽所能保护我所关心的人。

description.original: I punched the Caller into oblivion -- do you really want to try me?
description.display: 我把召唤者打得神志不清--你确定要挑战我吗？

description.original: Are we allowing fangs? Or no?
You have no idea who you're dealing with.
description.display: 你根本不知道自己在和谁打交道。

description.original: Some say it's a curse; I say it's what I am.
description.display: 有人说这是诅咒，我说这就是我。

effects.description: Increases the effect of all Fen's Specializations by $amount%

description.original: This is going to be bad.
If we put our heads together, we can overcome!
You have no idea who you're messing with.
description.display: 你根本不知道自己在和谁在闹。

character_sheet_details.backstory: Fen is a Drow Dhampir Warlock with a touch of mischief and sneakiness. She's loyal to those she cares for, a fearsome opponent for those who have earned her hate. Above all else, everything she's done has been for Isolde's freedom. Now she needs a new purpose to fight for, and maybe she can find it among the Society.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Fen is a DPS and support Champion, that increases progress made on Patron Challenges she is in the party for.

event_upgrades.description: Fen increases the damage of all Champions in her Column

event_upgrades.name: Patron's Oath
